notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for sri_lanka. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Sri Lanka
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Sri Lanka, VIZA AI should consider the official Sri Lanka ETA route through eta.gov.lk when applicable. First confirm nationality, purpose, stay length, entry count, passport validity, and whether the user qualifies for any free ETA policy. Use the official ETA site and do not promise eVisa availability without checking current rules. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Sri Lanka ETA official rules
chunks.content: Sri Lanka ETA official notices state that short-stay travellers for tourism or business must obtain an Electronic Travel Authorization via eta.gov.lk. Recent official notices list China among nationalities eligible for free ETA for tourism purposes, with a 30-day free visa period and double-entry facility within 30 days from first arrival, subject to current regulations. Passport validity of at least 6 months from first arrival is commonly required by Sri Lankan mission guidance.

chunks.title: Sri Lanka ETA scope and limits
chunks.content: Tourist/Business ETA is for short visits and cannot be converted into residence status as a general answer. If the user mentions work, long-term study, volunteering, residence, media work or paid activities, VIZA AI should route them away from tourist ETA and ask clarifying questions.

documents.title: Sri Lanka Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Sri Lanka application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Sri Lanka ETA portal Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://www.eta.gov.lk/slvisa/. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Sri Lanka fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality, travel dates, purpose, address in Sri Lanka, contact/email and double-entry/transit/business category answers

chunks.title: Sri Lanka supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport, return/onward travel and accommodation/contact details; keep ETA approval with the travel document Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for sri_lanka.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.eta.gov.lk/slvisa/

Passport and identity fields:
- Certified copy of the national identity card or passport photocopy of the Sri Lankan sponsor

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- free visa valid for 30 days (Maldivian nationals will receive 90 days), with double-entry facility permitted from the date of first arrival in Sri Lanka within the 30-day validity period.

Travel plan and port fields:
- Under this scheme tourists can enjoy a 30 days free visa period and a double entry facility is permitted from the date of first arrival to Sri Lanka within 30 days.
- Authorization (ETA) prior to arrival in Sri Lanka.As per the bilateral reciprocal agreement between Sri Lanka and Maldives, Maldivian nationals will receive 90 days tourist visa through ETA system.
- free visa valid for 30 days (Maldivian nationals will receive 90 days), with double-entry facility permitted from the date of first arrival in Sri Lanka within the 30-day validity period.

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- Visitors from Cameroon, Nigeria, Ivory Coast and Ghana who intend to apply ETA may adopt one of the following channels such as approaching to nearest Sri Lanka Overseas Mission or applying through Sri Lanka sponsor for their ETA through the Head Office of the Department of Immigration & Emigration.
- Visitors from Cameroon, Nigeria, Ivory Coast and Ghana who intend to apply for ETA may apply through Sri Lankan Sponsor for their ETA from the Head office of the Department of Immigration & Emigration, Sri Lanka.
- Sri Lankan Sponsor for their ETA from the Head office of the Department of Immigration & Emigration, Sri Lanka.

Purpose, occupation, work, and study fields:
- apply for Tourist or Business visa may apply through
- Visitors from Syria who intend to apply for Tourist or Business visa may apply through Sri Lankan Sponsor at the Head office of the Department of Immigration & Emigration, Sri Lanka.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
